reviews.author: Santosh Kumar
reviews.review_body:
Somerville International School is good school in Delhi NCR region. Their focus is on academics yet they spend right amount of time and effort on extra curricular activities like Music, Art & Craft, Football, Basketball, Aerobics etc. Teachers are well groomed and handles students well.

The school building is nice and lots of plantations are there. Focused approach towards keeping the environment green and clean.

"Despite these good things School management is very weak in communication. Most of the time either they do not send any communication or their communication is contradictory. To their convenience sometimes they use MS team for the last minute change in communication and sometimes they use email. There is absolutely no audit trail of any such communication. Despite giving continued feedback, School is doing the same thing again and again. The top management of the School must intervene to assess the situation and further improve."

|| Update from recent past experience ||

A significant improvement is now seen in the communication for the last couple of months ever since they have started using WhatsApp mode of communication. School Management has also provided dedicated mobile numbers to get in touch with the School and teacher.

However, School Management should focus on retaining good teachers. There is a high rate of mobilization in the teachers feternity in the school.

reviews.author: Rohit Kumar Gupta
reviews.review_body: Academics is good. Teachers are also cooperative. However it lacks in infrastructure as compared to other school in the vicinity.

reviews.author: Mishika Jane
reviews.review_body:
I have studied here for 4 years now and have yet to come across a school more nurturing and caring than SIS.
It gave me the opportunity to take part in several competitions and pick up so many sports, activities and skills that I normally would not have. The teachers have helped me with everything I’ve needed and have made me the person I am today.
I have watched the school grow and improve so much over the last few years.
I finished my grade 12 and passed out of school this year…and I think that I can very confidently say that the lessons taught to me here at SIS, academic and otherwise, will help and guide me in everything I go on to do in life.
Forever grateful to the staff, the teachers and the principal here :)

reviews.author: Navneet Rai
reviews.review_body:
Best academics, teachers are very polite and teach with great efforts, they ensure the development of child as per the abilities. School participates in inter school and intra school activities giving students exposure to compete in challenging atmosphere.
School has also started to focus on sports and have started winning laurels. Recently my child participated and was happy on the winning note. Thanks to the new Principal for bringing on the change.

reviews.author: Madhulika Liddle
reviews.review_body: A very good school (my daughter studies here), affiliated to CBSE. Besides the academic studies, there's also a lot of emphasis on extracurricular activities, with yoga, taekwondo, tabla, Western and Indian music, etc being taught from very junior classes.
